agreement:
MACHINE-PRECISION — empirical ⟨ψ_α | σ_C6 | ψ_β⟩ matches the
                   character-table prediction χ_α(C_6) of
                   tsotchke-private:theory/higher_algebra/KagomeZ2.{wl,py}
                   to 1.835e-11.
interpretation:
This confirms (a) projecting-Lanczos sector-purity,
                       (b) C_6 lattice permutation correctness, (c) C_6v
                       character-table correctness.  Establishes the
                       empirical-symbolic link required for the modular S
                       matrix extraction in subsequent work.
